message.content:
@startuml
title 借出图书 用例

actor "图书管理员" as Librarian
participant "账号判断" as AccountCheck
participant "业务控制" as BizCtrl
database "数据库" as DB

box "读者账号合法性验证"
Librarian -> AccountCheck : 1 输入读者账号信息
activate AccountCheck
AccountCheck -> BizCtrl : 2 获取账号信息
activate BizCtrl
BizCtrl -> DB : 3 比对账号密码合法性
activate DB
DB --> BizCtrl : 4 账号合法
deactivate DB
deactivate BizCtrl
deactivate AccountCheck
end box

box "借出图书"
Librarian -> BizCtrl : 5 输入借出图书信息
activate BizCtrl
BizCtrl -> DB : 6 增加借阅信息
activate DB
BizCtrl -> DB : 7 修改图书库存
BizCtrl <-- DB : 8 返回操作结果
deactivate DB
BizCtrl -> Librarian : 9 返回借出结果
deactivate BizCtrl
end box

@enduml
